stemHtml: According to Part-MED, applicants for and holders of pilot licences are required to hold the following class of medical certificates…

options.a: Class 2 for a CPL, and Class 1 for an MPL and ATPL.
options.b: Class 2 for a CPL and MPL, and Class 1 for an ATPL.
options.c: Class 1 for a CPL, MPL, and ATPL.
options.d: Class 1 for a CPL and ATPL, and Class 2 for an MPL.
